---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like.

## Acceptance criteria

How would you know this is done? What should the feature do?

- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Priority / Impact

How important is this to your workflow?

- [ ] Critical — blocks my usage
- [ ] High — significant improvement
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — minor convenience

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

## Additional context

Add any mockups, screenshots, links, or references.
